channel.title: Handy Pioneers Blog — Vancouver WA Handyman & Remodeling
channel.description: Home repair tips, project stories, and local insights from Marcin Micek at Handy Pioneers in Clark County, WA.

item.title: We Pressure Washed 3 Driveways in One Week in Vancouver — Here's What We Found Under the Moss
item.description: Moss in the Pacific Northwest isn't just ugly — it's actively destroying your concrete. Here's what we uncovered on three Clark County driveways this spring.

item.title: The 3 Things Vancouver Homeowners Forget to Check Every Spring (And Why One of Them Could Cost $10,000)
item.description: Most Clark County homeowners spend spring cleaning the inside of their house. The damage is almost always on the outside — and in three specific places most people never look.

item.title: What the 2026 Clark County Housing Market Means for Your Home's Value (And What to Fix First)
item.description: The median Clark County home now sells for $549,000. The difference between the top 20% and the bottom 20% isn't location — it's maintenance.

item.title: Hiring a Handyman in Vancouver WA: 7 Questions You Must Ask Before Signing Anything
item.description: In Washington State, anyone can call themselves a handyman. Here's how to tell the difference between a pro and a problem — before they're in your home.

item.title: Introducing the 360° Method: From Reactive Chaos to Proactive Control
item.description: Most homeowners manage their homes the same way — they wait for something to break, panic, call someone, pay more than they should, and repeat. The 360° Method is a 9-step system that ends that cycle.
